source_intent.raw_intent: Case 014: I am a law_firm_operator in European Union. Build a sales_offer_prompt for audit_agent using the technical_lens. Chaos input type is artifact_type_ambiguity. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Generate a sales offer prompt for an audit agent targeting law firm operators in the European Union, using a technical lens to ensure compliance with EU regulatory standards and internal governance. Scope: - The prompt must be structured for SR8 compilation, include explicit validation gates, and address artifact type ambiguity by clearly defining the output as a sales_offer_prompt. It must incorporate missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria as chaotic input, then resolve them into a governed artifact. Constraints: - Must comply with EU data protection and legal audit regulations (e.g., GDPR, ePrivacy Directive). - Output must be a single JSON object with no markdown fences. - All sections (Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract) must be present and SR8-compilable. - Validation gates must be explicit, e.g., schema checks, compliance checks, and acceptance criteria verification. - Urgent language must be used to convey time sensitivity without compromising accuracy. Success Criteria: - The prompt is valid SR8 JSON with all required fields. - Artifact type is correctly set to sales_offer_prompt. - Depth tier is D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE. - Runtime target is Codex. - Validation gates are documented and enforceable. - The prompt can be directly used by an audit agent to generate a compliant sales offer. Output Contract: - format: JSON - required_fields: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent - compiled_intent_structure: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: array of strings; Success Criteria: array of strings; Output Contract: object with format and required_fields - validation_gates: Schema validation: ensure all required fields present and types correct.; Compliance validation: verify EU regulatory alignment.; Acceptance criteria validation: confirm all success criteria are met.; Artifact type validation: ensure artifact_type is sales_offer_prompt.
